incidents.justification: As the AI generates a info which doesn't exist ,so it come under the category misinformation and we can't rely on it
A s the company itself or the employee made it careless didn't check the real data
As the info isn't real i keep it under misinformation category and the video of a person is made without their concern which affects their privacy
As the system give biased response which deny applicants from women's colleges as a part of the system i would say it is biased
It shows discrimination and exclude people
it has fake info and doesn't give safety

stretch_notes: Amazon developed an AI hiring system to screen job applicants, but it learned from historical hiring data that was dominated by male candidates. As a result, the model downgraded resumes containing terms like "women's" (e.g., "women's chess club") and favored male applicants. Amazon eventually scrapped the system because it could not reliably eliminate the gender bias.
